observation_summary.description: Full tactical observation: ownship attitude + speed + altitude + health, relative geometry (ATA, AA, LOS), target health, WEZ flag, pursuit score. All features normalized to [-1, 1]. Observation space bounds: [-1, 1].

reward_summary.description: Survival bonus (curriculum) + step penalty + pursuit shaping (smooth ATA×range gradient) + damage differential + low altitude penalty + terminal rewards.
